name: Hestia Insight Inc.
business: Hestia Insight Inc. is an AI-powered capital markets advisory and business consulting firm that provides comprehensive fundraising solutions for emerging growth companies. It offers AI-enhanced services including pre-raise strategy, market research, investor materials preparation, and investor outreach. The company focuses on healthcare and biotech sectors through its subsidiaries while expanding across industries.

exposures.sentence: Hestia Insight Inc. is an AI-powered capital markets advisory and business consulting firm specializing in comprehensive fundraising solutions for emerging growth companies.

The Company maintains strategic focus on healthcare and biotech sectors through its two wholly owned operating subsidiaries, Hestia Investments Inc. and HSTA Health Inc., while expanding its AI-powered advisory services across all industry verticals.

catalysts.sentence: Subsequent to December 31, 2025, the Company determined to discontinue the operations of one of its wholly owned subsidiaries, HSTA Health.

catalysts.event: Board approval to raise up to $5 million in capital
catalysts.sentence: To support the company's strategic transformation, Hestia Insight's Board of Directors has approved a capital raise of up to $5 million.
